title: Tool Enhancement│工具強化
description: Fortify your combat tools! Tridents and maces no longer lose durability from mining, and swords consume significantly less durability when breaking blocks.│強化你的工具！現在三叉戟和重錘在挖掘時不會損耗耐久，而劍在破壞方塊時的耐久損耗也大幅降低。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
- Tridents and maces do not consume durability when mining.│三叉戟和重錘不會因為挖掘而消耗耐久度。
- All swords consume only 1 durability when breaking blocks.│所有使用劍破壞方塊只消耗1耐久。
